results.title: Toothless Tigers no match for Hawks as Wizard, Lewis run riot
AGNC Investment (AGNCP) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Monday
results.description: AGNC Investment (NASDAQ:AGNCP – Get Free Report) is expected to be releasing its resultson Monday, July 20th. Analysts expect AGNC Investment to post earnings of $0.3807 per share and revenue of $1.0554 billion for the quarter. AGNC Investment Price Performance AGNCP stock opened at $25.03 on Friday. AGNC Investment has a 1-year low of $23.62 [...]

results.title: Hope wants West Indies to get 'the results we really want' to honour Sobers
results.description: West Indies are 2-1 down in the five-match series against New Zealand, and need more wins to ensure direct qualification for the 2027 ODI World Cup
